channel.title: PrimitiveKit – Form
channel.description: Recent content in Form on PrimitiveKit

item.title: Button
item.description:
Button

Interactive button component with multiple variants, sizes, and states for triggering actions.

Import 

import { ButtonComponent } from '@primitivekit/angular';

Basic Usage 

<pk-button>Content</pk-button>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Button component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<pk-button [style]="{
 '--button-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--button-text-color': '#ffffff'
}">Custom</pk-button>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --button-gap
  • --button-padding-y
  • --button-padding-x
  • --button-min-height
  • --button-min-width
  • --button-font-family
  • --button-font-size
  • --button-font-weight
  • --button-line-height
  • --button-background
  • … and 63 more

Accessibility

The Button component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component
Enter Activate component
Space Activate component

Related Components

  • Input - Text input field component with validation, icons, and various input types.
  • Select - Dropdown component for selecting one or multiple options from a list.
  • Checkbox - Form input component for selecting one or multiple options from a set.
  • Radio - Form input component for selecting a single option from a set of mutually exclusive choices.
  • Switch - Toggle component for switching between two states, typically on/off or enabled/disabled.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Button
item.description:
Button

Interactive button component with multiple variants, sizes, and states for triggering actions.

Import 

import { Button } from '@primitivekit/vanilla';

Basic Usage 

const button = new Button({ /* options */ });
document.body.appendChild(button.element);

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Button component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

const button = new Button({
 style: {
 '--button-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--button-text-color': '#ffffff'
 }
});

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --button-gap
  • --button-padding-y
  • --button-padding-x
  • --button-min-height
  • --button-min-width
  • --button-font-family
  • --button-font-size
  • --button-font-weight
  • --button-line-height
  • --button-background
  • … and 63 more

Accessibility

The Button component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component
Enter Activate component
Space Activate component

Related Components

  • Input - Text input field component with validation, icons, and various input types.
  • Select - Dropdown component for selecting one or multiple options from a list.
  • Checkbox - Form input component for selecting one or multiple options from a set.
  • Radio - Form input component for selecting a single option from a set of mutually exclusive choices.
  • Switch - Toggle component for switching between two states, typically on/off or enabled/disabled.

item.title: Checkbox
item.description:
Checkbox

Form input component for selecting one or multiple options from a set.

Import 

import { CheckboxComponent } from '@primitivekit/angular';

Basic Usage 

<pk-checkbox>Content</pk-checkbox>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Checkbox component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<pk-checkbox [style]="{
 '--checkbox-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--checkbox-text-color': '#ffffff'

  • --checkbox-size

item.title: Form
item.description:
Form

Container component for grouping form inputs with validation and submission handling.

Import 

import { FormComponent } from '@primitivekit/angular';

Basic Usage

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Form component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

 '--form-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--form-text-color': '#ffffff'
}">Custom</pk-form>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --form-gap
  • --form-padding
  • --form-item-margin-bottom

  • --form-label-font-weight
  • --form-label-line-height
  • --form-label-color

item.title: Input
item.description:
Input

Text input field component with validation, icons, and various input types.

Import 

import { InputComponent } from '@primitivekit/angular';

Basic Usage 

<pk-input>Content</pk-input>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Input component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<pk-input [style]="{
 '--input-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--input-text-color': '#ffffff'
}">Custom</pk-input>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --input-wrapper-gap
  • --input-wrapper-width
  • --input-label-font-size
  • --input-label-font-weight
  • --input-label-color
  • --input-label-margin-bottom
  • --input-required-color
  • --input-required-margin-left
  • --input-padding-y
  • --input-padding-x
  • … and 39 more

Accessibility

The Input component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component
Enter Activate component
Space Activate component

Related Components

  • Button - Interactive button component with multiple variants, sizes, and states for triggering actions.
  • Select - Dropdown component for selecting one or multiple options from a list.
  • Checkbox - Form input component for selecting one or multiple options from a set.
  • Radio - Form input component for selecting a single option from a set of mutually exclusive choices.
  • Switch - Toggle component for switching between two states, typically on/off or enabled/disabled.

  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference

item.title: Switch
item.description:
Switch

Toggle component for switching between two states, typically on/off or enabled/disabled.

Import 

import { SwitchComponent } from '@primitivekit/angular';

Basic Usage 

<pk-switch>Content</pk-switch>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Switch component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<pk-switch [style]="{
 '--switch-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--switch-text-color': '#ffffff'
}">Custom</pk-switch>

Design Tokens

  • --switch-width
  • --switch-height
  • --switch-bg-color

  • --switch-thumb-size
  • --switch-thumb-color
  • --switch-thumb-offset
  • --switch-label-gap
  • --switch-label-color
  • --switch-label-font-size

Basic Usage
